---
id: send-specific-notification
title: "Channel Specific Notifications"
description: "Send a notification via a specific channel (email, SMS, or WhatsApp) for a given template. The channel is specified in the URL path."
sidebar_label: "Channel Specific Notifications"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Channel Specific Notifications"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/notifications/send/{channel}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send a notification via a specific channel (email, SMS, or WhatsApp) for a given template. The channel is specified in the URL path.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
